positive: A stunning, highly detailed celestial geometric arrangement featuring interconnected crystalline flora and stylized constellations. The composition is strictly central, utilizing bold, clean black silhouettes against a gradient background of deep sapphire blue and vibrant indigo. Include stylized elements like glowing nebula swirls, interconnected roots forming a mandala pattern, and ethereal, bioluminescent butterflies forming geometric pathways. Use strong backlighting and rim lighting techniques to emphasize the edges and crystal structures, achieving maximal contrast and a clean, stylized aesthetic perfect for textile printing. Intricate, ornamental, high contrast, minimal realism.
negative: photorealism, low quality, blurry, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, messy, dirty, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame, human figures, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, artist names
